visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a grey newsboy cap and black-rimmed round glasses is positioned in the center against a blurred neutral studio background. He wears a purple T-shirt and has a wooden bead bracelet on his right wrist. He gestures emphatically with his hands while looking directly into the camera lens. A large green LINE logo with a white speech bubble appears at the bottom of the frame, accompanied by logo overlays in the upper left corner. (2) The camera remains static as the man continues to speak with an animated facial expression. A graphic of a digital smartwatch and another LINE logo appear simultaneously on either side of him. Later, large text overlays including '7月22日' and 'Wear OS' appear to emphasize key dates and platforms. He uses his index finger to point upwards and towards the camera, maintaining an engaged and slightly urgent demeanor. (3) The man continues his explanation, moving his hands to illustrate the process of updating. A graphic showing a smartwatch icon with a red upward-pointing arrow appears, symbolizing an app update. Text indicating version '1.4.2' and '舊版本' pops up next to a graphic of a document. The lighting remains bright and even across his face, with no significant changes in the background environment or furniture. (4) As he reaches the conclusion, he gestures towards his ear and then points forcefully at the camera to emphasize the call to action. The text '無法連動' and finally '快點啊!' appear in large, stylized fonts. A small cartoonish cloud of smoke graphic appears near his head to add a sense of comic urgency. He maintains consistent eye contact, leaning slightly forward to engage the viewer during the final seconds.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c 有意思 tim 哥. [Logo]: @ 3ctim. [Slogan]: LINE. (2) [Subtitle]: 不然收不到訊息. (3) [Subtitle]: 怎麼說呢. (4) [Subtitle]: 有用智慧手錶連動 LINE 的粉絲注意了. (5) [Subtitle]: 目前 LINE 官方宣布. (6) [Subtitle]: 7月22日 將終止支援. (7) [Subtitle]: Wear OS 系統中 1.4.2 以下 舊版本 LINE 應用程式. (8) [Subtitle]: 白話文講就是 7/22 之前 如果你的手錶 沒有升級到 LINE App 的話. (9) [Subtitle]: 過了 7月22日 你都不能收訊息了 看通知 整個都完全不能用. (10) [Subtitle]: 如果你的手錶太舊 無法升級到新版本 那很抱歉 你的 LINE 將無法連動 智慧手錶來使用了. [Slogan]: 無法連動. (11) [Subtitle]: 所以趕快 打開你的 智慧手錶 Play 商店 確認一下 而且更新一下 LINE 應用程式到最新版本. (12) [Subtitle]: 快點啊!. [Slogan]: 快點啊!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator speaking directly to the camera throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male with round black glasses, a grey newsboy cap, a purple short-sleeved t-shirt, and a wooden bead bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, out-of-focus indoor studio background with neutral tones and some soft lighting artifacts, typical of a professional content creation space.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear, energetic male voice with a professional yet friendly narrative tone begins speaking immediately. The speech rate is high, conveying urgency. In the background, an upbeat and rhythmic electronic music track plays at a low volume, providing a steady pop pulse. There is no significant ambient interference, indicating a studio environment. (2) A synthesized 'pop' sound effect triggers as a graphic appears on the screen, marking a transition in content. The speaker's pitch variability increases as he highlights specific technical terms and software versions. The BGM continues with a consistent tempo, while the vocal articulation remains extremely crisp and enunciated. (3) A distinct 'ding' sound effect occurs as new text overlays appear, providing a structured auditory cue for the viewer. The speaker's voice becomes more authoritative and projected as he explains the consequences of the technical change. The music's beat strength remains moderate, supporting the spoken narrative without masking the primary signal. (4) The final segment is characterized by a high-energy vocal delivery with increased arousal. A quick succession of comic-style sound effects accompanies the closing graphic elements. The music reaches its final phrase and cuts off abruptly with the man's last spoken word, followed by a momentary silence before the audio track ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Information -> Reason/Evidence -> Warning -> Solution/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide urgent technical information to LINE users who use Wear OS smartwatches, informing them of an upcoming version termination and instructing them to update their apps to maintain functionality.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a typical high-energy tech news short-form video designed for social media. The combination of energetic speech, frequent SFX, and constant text overlays is aimed at retaining viewer attention while delivering concise information.
